examples: I don't have no stinking lath!
A as thin as a lath women.
I must get a lath even a small one for stuff like this.
There was no insulation anywhere and what little residual heat there was soon leaked through the ceiling lath.
Staple a wire lath to plywood, as you would for a stucco wall, apply thin-set mortar and stick the artificial stones into the mortar.
